block_03: Jap aap Asia Trading Cup ke sabhi char round safalta purvak pura karte hai, to apne aasteen ko mod len aur dopahar ka bhojan pack pack kar len kyonki ham trading ke arth ko ek naye astar par le jayenge. Agle saptahh se, Sandhon aur bhaluon ke beech final match shuru ho raha hai. Asli tradaron ke paas jeetkar apna naam kamane aur mauka hoga Asia me №1 trader ka darja pane ka.
block_04: Final Trading Sangraam bas kuch dinon me shuru ho raha hai, July 27 ko — Jo tournament table ke top-10 traders me pravesh karengen unhe milega $5000 ka nagad puruskaar seedhe unke khaate me. Leaderboard me jitna bada trader ki sthiti hogi, puruskaar bhi utna hi bada hoga!
block_05: Sabse behtar ke saath sir se sir milakar chalne ke liye taiyaar hain?
block_11: $50 ya ek ticket jo pichle tournament me jeeta gaya ho
block_15: Tournament ke dauran aapke bhugtaan ka ek bhaag puruskaar pool me joda jayega. Bhag lene wale sabhi trader ek vishesh khaate ke saath tournament shuru karengen. Balance ki raashi tournament ke anusaar alag-alag hote hain.
block_16: *Tournament jeetne par hi jeetne wale ko puruskaar ki rahi ka ek hissa milega.
